DP.158.0000:
Julia: Oh, hello.
You’re quite the nifty Trainer.\f
My husband is a Sailor, and he’s off
working somewhere far away.\f
I long for the day he comes back
to me.\f
All that waiting gets to be very
boring every day, though...\f
I know! How about you visit me and
tell me stories every so often?
DP.158.0001:
Starting tomorrow, please visit and
tell me stories about your travels.
DP.158.0002:
Julia: Today is Monday!\f
It’s time to get going on a brand-new
week.\f
Is there a story that might help
me perk up?\f
Maybe a story about getting splashed
with water...
DP.158.0003:
[011C,0000] splashed with water...
...\f
That sounds refreshing!
It’s made me feel awake!\f
DP.158.0004:
Thank you!
Please give this to your Pokémon.\f
DP.158.0007:
Julia: Please tell me another story
tomorrow.
DP.158.0008:
Julia: Hello!\f
Oh, this is the [0100,0001] I gave
a Ribbon to before.\f
I’ve got lots of Ribbons--you should
bring other Pokémon.
DP.158.0009:
Julia: Oh...
You couldn’t think up anything?
DP.158.0010:
Julia: Today is Tuesday!\f
The first date I went on with my
husband was on Tuesday, too.\f
I remember my heart thumping like
I was scared, and I guess I was.\f
Do you know any story that would
scare me like that?\f
Like something that jumps out
from hiding?
DP.158.0011:
One mean [011C,0000] that bursts
out from a closet?\r
...\f
Yikes!
That would be scary!\f
DP.158.0012:
Julia: Sigh...
I gained a little weight...\f
This dress that my husband bought
for me is too tight now...\f
This makes me feel sad...\f
Misery does love company.
Something that would make me cry?
DP.158.0013:
A tearful [011C,0000]...
...\f
Sniffle... That is so sad...
I feel desolate, even!\f
DP.158.0014:
Julia: It’s Thursday already?
I lost track of time!\f
My favorite magazine comes out today.
I’d better go buy it quick!\f
Do you know a story about being
absentminded?\f
Like getting your shoes backward?
DP.158.0015:
The [011C,0000] had shoes
on the wrong feet?\f
...
Ahahaha! That is so silly!\f
How is it possible to be that
absentminded?\f
DP.158.0016:
Julia: Today is Friday!\f
My meager cooking repertoire is
about to run out!\f
Do you know a story that would
help me get my thoughts in order?\f
Like a story about numbers adding
up perfectly?
DP.158.0017:
You went [011C,0000]
shopping and paid $777 including tax?\f
That is a nice number to ring up.
It just has a good look to it.\f
It’s sure helped me clear my head!\f
DP.158.0018:
Julia: Yawn...
Today’s Saturday...\r
I’m feeling lazy and sleepy...\f
I wish I had a pillow...
But what kind of a pillow?
DP.158.0019:
[011C,0000] snuggle pillow...
...\f
It... It surprisingly may give me
a good night’s sleep!\f
I wonder if I can buy one somewhere.\f
DP.158.0020:
Julia: Oh, hello! You’re on your
adventure even though it’s Sunday!\f
When I was younger, I remember that
every day was like an adventure.\f
It was always fun. I loved the people
around me... I was happy.\f
Oh, but I’m happy now, too.
I love my life with my husband.\r
It’s just a different kind of happy.\f
So, what makes you happy?
DP.158.0021:
You love [011C,0000]?
...\f
Ufufu... That says something about
you. It puts a smile on my face!\f
